title: Mastech Holdings is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mastech Holdings is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
